query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, sport, gameDate, spreadAwayBetsPct, spreadAwayMoneyPct, totalOverBetsPct, totalOverMoneyPct, mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct FROM games WHERE (awayTeam LIKE '%islanders%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%islanders%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%rangers%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%rangers%' OR awayTeam = 'new_york_islanders' OR homeTeam = 'new_york_islanders' OR awayTeam = 'new_york_rangers' OR homeTeam = 'new_york_rangers' OR awayTeam = 'ny_islanders' OR homeTeam = 'ny_islanders') AND sport = 'NHL' ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3AW8r3RRauadYzS.root --database MW3FicTy7ae3qrm8dx8Lua --execute SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, sport, gameDate, spreadAwayBetsPct, spreadAwayMoneyPct, totalOverBetsPct, totalOverMoneyPct, mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct FROM games WHERE (awayTeam LIKE '%islanders%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%islanders%' OR awayTeam LIKE '%rangers%' OR homeTeam LIKE '%rangers%' OR awayTeam = 'new_york_islanders' OR homeTeam = 'new_york_islanders' OR awayTeam = 'new_york_rangers' OR homeTeam = 'new_york_rangers' OR awayTeam = 'ny_islanders' OR homeTeam = 'ny_islanders') AND sport = 'NHL' ORDER BY gameDate DESC LIMIT 10;
